originalTitle: Meta has a new app called Pocket that is absolutely nothing like the old Pocket
summary: Mozilla shut down the well-loved read-it-later Pocket app last year, and now Meta is launching an app called Pocket with an entirely different, AI-focused pitch: this new app lets you make and share little interactive "gizmos" built from an AI prompt, as reported by Business Insider. Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg is all in on AI […]
content: Mozilla shut down the well-loved read-it-later Pocket app last year, and now Meta is launching an app called Pocket with an entirely different, AI-focused pitch: this new app lets you make and share little interactive “gizmos” built from an AI prompt, as reported by Business Insider. Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg is all in on AI as the new social media, and he’s previously described a vision of how users could use AI to make interactive experiences and share them with people. The launch of Pocket appears to be one manifestation of that idea, and it follows Meta hiring engineers from a company called Atma Sciences Inc., which made an app called Gizmo, as Business Insider reported in March. Meta got a non-exclusive license to use the company’s technology, and based on screenshots of Pocket on Google Play, the app looks to be pretty similar to Gizmo. “Scroll a feed of gizmos from people around the world,” Meta says in Pocket’s Google Play description. “Gizmos respond to your touch and the tilt of your phone. They play sound effects and your favorite songs. They can use your camera or pull in photos from your camera roll. Some can even reason about the world around them.” On a help center page, Meta also describes a gizmo as a “playable AI-generated experience,” and when you post one, Meta says you can choose to let other people remix them.  However, if you’re in the US, it doesn’t seem like you can download Pocket just yet. Two US-based Verge staffers saw a note on the Google Play listing that said the app “isn’t available in your country.” I can’t find the app on Apple’s US App Store. Meta also notes in its help center that the app is “not yet available everywhere.” The company didn’t immediately reply to a request for comment.
chineseTitle: Meta 有一个名为 Pocket 的新应用程序，它与旧的 Pocket 完全不同
chineseSummary: Mozilla 去年关闭了广受喜爱的稍后阅读 Pocket 应用程序，现在 Meta 推出了一款名为 Pocket 的应用程序，它的定位完全不同，以 AI 为中心：据 Business Insider 报道，这款新应用程序可让您制作和共享根据 AI 提示构建的小型交互式“小玩意”。 Meta 首席执行官马克·扎克伯格 (Mark Zuckerberg) 全力投入人工智能领域 [...]
chineseContent: Mozilla 去年关闭了广受喜爱的稍后阅读 Pocket 应用程序，现在 Meta 推出了一款名为 Pocket 的应用程序，其宣传方式完全不同，以 AI 为中心：据 Business Insider 报道，这款新应用程序可让您制作和共享根据 AI 提示构建的小型交互式“小玩意”。 Meta 首席执行官马克·扎克伯格 (Mark Zuckerberg) 完全致力于将人工智能视为新的社交媒体，他之前曾描述过用户如何使用人工智能打造互动体验并与人们分享的愿景。 Pocket 的推出似乎是这一想法的体现之一，据 Business Insider 三月份报道，Meta 从一家名为 Atma Sciences Inc. 的公司聘请了工程师，该公司开发了一款名为 Gizmo 的应用程序。 Meta 获得了使用该公司技术的非独家许可，并且根据 Google Play 上 Pocket 的屏幕截图，该应用程序看起来与 Gizmo 非常相似。 Meta 在 Pocket 的 Google Play 描述中说道：“滚动浏览来自世界各地的小玩意。” “小发明会对你的触摸和手机的倾斜做出反应。它们会播放音效和你最喜欢的歌曲。它们可以使用你的相机或从相机胶卷中提取照片。有些甚至可以推理周围的世界。”在帮助中心页面上，Meta 还将小发明描述为“可玩的人工智能生成的体验”，当您发布小发明时，Meta 表示您可以选择让其他人重新混合它们。  然而，如果你在美国，似乎还不能下载 Pocket。两名美国 Verge 员工在 Google Play 列表中看到一条注释，称该应用“在您所在的国家/地区不可用”。我在苹果美国应用程序商店中找不到该应用程序。 Meta 还在其帮助中心指出，该应用程序“尚未在所有地方可用”。该公司没有立即回复置评请求。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
